'''Wrokix Works''' was a company that produced powered [[Armor/Legends|armor]], specifically the [[AV-1 power armor]]. Another of their products was the [[Deluxe Boarding Armor]] which was equipped with multiple respiration systems, self-healing patches, communication devices, and armor plating to prevent possible breaches.

{{Company-stub}}
